# defectdojo_credential_mapping (Data Source)

Data source for DefectDojo Credential Mapping

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "defectdojo_credential_mapping" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier

### Read-Only

- `cred_id` (Number) The ID of the Credential.
- `engagement` (Number) The ID of the Engagement.
- `finding` (Number) The ID of the Finding.
- `is_authn_provider` (Boolean) Whether this is an authentication provider.
- `product` (Number) The ID of the Product.
- `test` (Number) The ID of the Test.
- `url` (String) URL associated with the credential mapping.
